2604.25326.title: AHASD: Asynchronous Heterogeneous Architecture for LLM Adaptive Drafting Speculative Decoding on Mobile Devices
2604.25326.paper_summary: Speculative decoding enhances the inference efficiency of large language models (LLMs) by generating drafts using a small draft language model (DLM) and verifying them in batches with a large target language model (TLM). However, adaptive drafting inference on a mobile single-NPU-PIM system faces idle overhead in traditional operator-level synchronous execution and wasted computation in asynchronous execution due to fluctuations in draft length. This paper introduces AHASD, a task-level asynchronous mobile NPU-PIM heterogeneous architecture for speculative decoding. Notably, AHASD achieves parallel drafting on the PIM and verification on a single NPU through task-level DLM-TLM decoupling and specifically, it incorporates Entropy-History-Aware Drafting Control and Time-Aware Pre-Verification Control to dynamically manage adaptive drafting algorithm execution and pre-verification timing, suppressing invalid drafting based on low-confidence drafts. Additionally, AHASD integrates Attention Algorithm Units and Gated Task Scheduling Units within LPDDR5-PIM to enable attention link localization and sub-microsecond task switching on the PIM side. Experimental results for different LLMs and adaptive drafting algorithms show that AHASD achieves up to 4.2$\times$ in throughput and 5.6$\times$ in energy efficiency improvements over a GPU-only baseline, and 1.5$\times$ in throughput and 1.24$\times$ in energy efficiency gains over the state-of-the-art GPU+PIM baseline, with hardware overhead below 3\% of the DRAM area.
2604.25326.paper_summary_zh: 推測解碼透過使用小型草稿語言模型（DLM）生成草稿並在大型目標語言模型（TLM）中批量驗證，提升了大型語言模型（LLMs）的推理效率。<lb/>然而，在移動單NPU-PIM系統上進行自適應草擬推理時，由於草稿長度的波動，傳統運算子級同步執行面臨閒置開銷，而異步執行則浪費計算資源。<lb/>本文介紹了AHASD，一種針對推測解碼的任務級異步移動NPU-PIM異構架構。<lb/>值得注意的是，AHASD通過任務級DLM-TLM解耦實現了在PIM上的並行草擬和在單個NPU上的驗證，並特別納入了熵-歷史-感知草擬控制和時間-感知預驗證控制，以動態管理自適應草擬算法執行和預驗證時機，根據低置信度草稿抑制無效草擬。<lb/>此外，AHASD在LPDDR5-PIM中整合了注意力算法單元和閘控任務調度單元，以實現注意力鏈路定位和在PIM端的亞微秒任務切換。<lb/>對於不同的LLMs和自適應草擬算法的實驗結果顯示，AHASD在吞吐量上達到高達4.2$\times$的提升，並在能效上提升5.6$\times$，相較於僅使用GPU的基準，並在吞吐量上提升1.5$\times$，在能效上提升1.24$\times$，相較於最先進的GPU+PIM基準，硬體開銷低於DRAM區域的3\%。
2604.25326.author: Ma zirui et.al.
2604.25326.authors: Ma zirui, Fan Zhihua, Li Wenxing, Wu Haibin, Zhang Fulin, Ye Xiaochun, Li Wenming
